announcements.title: 📢 General Notice
announcements.body: **Voting closes** this Friday at *5 PM*. Make sure you vote!

announcements.title: ⚠️ Reminder
announcements.body: Each student can vote only **once**. Any duplicate entry will be disqualified.

announcements.title: ✅ Confirm Your Info
announcements.body: _Double-check_ your name, class, and admission number before submitting.
